original_final_question: Can you tell me which high school had a consistently top 3 number of violent/disruptive incident reported between 2010 and 2014? The borough containing that high school also has a suspension bridge that connects to NYC, what is the name of that suspension bridge?. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text:
1. Which NYC high schools were in the top 3 by total VADIR incidents in 2010-11?
2. Which NYC high schools were in the top 3 by total VADIR incidents in 2011-12?
3. Which NYC high schools were in the top 3 by total VADIR incidents in 2012-13?
4. Which NYC high schools were in the top 3 by total VADIR incidents in 2013-14?
5. In which NYC borough is <intersection of node_1, node_2, node_3, node_4> located?
6. Which bridges in NYC are suspension bridges?
7. Which bridges connect to <node_5 answer>?
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Find top 3 NYC high schools by VADIR incidents in 2010-11 → {Lehman, Jackie Robinson, Susan E Wagner}
Node 2: Find top 3 NYC high schools by VADIR incidents in 2011-12 → {Lehman, Susan E Wagner, John Adams}
Node 3: Find top 3 NYC high schools by VADIR incidents in 2012-13 → {Brooklyn Secondary, Susan E Wagner, Lehman}
Node 4: Find top 3 NYC high schools by VADIR incidents in 2013-14 → {Susan E Wagner, Richmond Hill, Acad for College Prep}
Intersection of <node_1>, <node_2>, <node_3>, <node_4>: Only school in top 3 all four years → Susan E. Wagner High School
Node 5 depends on intersection: Find borough where Susan E. Wagner HS is located → Staten Island
Node 6: Find suspension bridges in NYC → {Brooklyn, Williamsburg, Manhattan, GW, Bronx-Whitestone, Throgs Neck, Verrazzano-Narrows}
Node 7 depends on node 5: Find bridges connecting to Staten Island → {Verrazzano-Narrows, Outerbridge, Goethals, Bayonne}
Intersection of <node_6>, <node_7>: Only suspension bridge connecting to Staten Island → Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge
